    colors?: string[];

        readonly theme: {
            readonly text: readonly ["hero", "hero-mobile", "display", "title", "heading", "subheading", "body", "small", "mono", "caption", "micro", ...string[]];
            readonly color: readonly ["signage-bg", "signage-text", "accent-text", "accent-hover", "primary-hover", "terminal", "manifesto", "success", "border-subtle", "border-strong", ...string[]];

    };
};

// @public (undocumented)
type WithElementRef<T, U extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement> = T & {
    ref?: U | null;
};

// @public (undocumented)
type WithoutChild<T> = T extends {
    child?: unknown;
} ? Omit<T, 'child'> : T;

// @public (undocumented)
type WithoutChildren<T> = T extends {
    children?: unknown;
} ? Omit<T, 'children'> : T;

// @public (undocumented)
type WithoutChildrenOrChild<T> = WithoutChildren<WithoutChild<T>>;
